class.name: OpenCascadeVersion
class.brief_description: Provides access to OpenCASCADE version information.
class.description: This class exposes OpenCASCADE Technology (OCCT) version information to GDScript. It provides methods to retrieve the version string, major/minor/maintenance version numbers, and the complete version identifier. OpenCASCADE is an open-source CAD/CAM/CAE framework, and this GDExtension provides bindings for Godot Engine.

method.name: get_version_string
method.description: Returns the OpenCASCADE version as a human-readable string (e.g., "7.9.3").

method.name: get_version_major
method.description: Returns the major version number of OpenCASCADE (e.g., 7 for version 7.9.3).

method.name: get_version_minor
method.description: Returns the minor version number of OpenCASCADE (e.g., 9 for version 7.9.3).

method.name: get_version_maintenance
method.description: Returns the maintenance/patch version number of OpenCASCADE (e.g., 3 for version 7.9.3).
